top_trace.command: Lift the object from its start position above the table and maintain a stable opposed thumb-index grasp until the object remains controlled above the height threshold.

phase_schedule.intent: Move the palm/base laterally over the object while keeping thumb and index open for clearance.
Lower the palm toward the object to establish a centered pre-grasp without pushing it sideways.
Flex thumb and index toward each other around the object until contact or near-closed timed grasp is reached.
Hold the closed grasp briefly so opposing contacts stabilize before lifting.
Retract/raise the palm vertically while maintaining the closed opposed grasp so the object rises above 0.075 m.
Keep palm steady above the table and maintain finger closure to prevent slip.

base.command: End with palm centered over object start xy, then retract upward after grasp to moderately high base_z while keeping xy steady and holding controlled.
Move base_x to -0.0394 and base_y to -0.0383 at current/precontact height.
Hold base position while appendage units close and contact settles.
Lift by changing only base_z to -0.05 while holding base_x=-0.0394 and base_y=-0.0383.
Hold final base pose to keep object controlled.

thumb.command: Relative to final centered palm pose, move thumb actuator from g_right=0.06 toward strong opposing closure around g_right=0.005..0.015 and maintain inward pressure during lift/hold.
Use only g_right: keep clear during approach/precontact, close progressively to 0.010, wait for settle, then hold 0.010 through lift and stabilization.

index.command: Relative to the final centered palm pose, move from open g_left=0.06 toward strong flexion/near closed, about g_left=0.005 to 0.015, and maintain contact during lift and hold.
Command only index joint g_left: close from 0.06 to 0.010, wait for contact/settle, then keep g_left at 0.010 during lift/hold.
